description_long: This object is a cluster of orange flowers with six-petaled blooms arranged around a central green bud. The petals are broad, slightly overlapping, and have a soft, matte texture. The flowers are supported by a thick, green stem that branches out to hold the blossoms at varying heights. Two large, ovate green leaves extend from the base, providing a lush backdrop to the floral display. The central bud is tightly closed, contrasting with the open flowers surrounding it. The coloration is primarily a warm orange for the petals and a deep green for the stem and leaves, giving the object a vibrant, natural appearance.
description: A cluster of orange, six-petaled flowers with a central green bud and two large green leaves on a thick stem. The petals are broad and slightly overlapping, creating a lush, vibrant look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central green bud surrounded by open orange flowers and two large green leaves at the base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the right-side flowers and the curvature of the leaves, with the central bud still visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flower cluster and the full spread of the two large green leaves.
description_view_3: Left-side view focusing on the leftmost flower and the elongated leaf, with the central bud partially obscured.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration around the central bud, with each flower displaying overlapping and slightly layered petals, creating a symmetrical and circular pattern typical of many ornamental flowers.
